meta.notes: Manually maintained. Refresh from LinkedIn quarterly; GitHub section is auto-polled separately.

profile.name: Zachary Odennihy
profile.headline: Automation System Operator | Robotics | AI Engineering Student
profile.summary: Versatile technical professional with 15+ years of experience spanning robotics automation, heavy equipment operation, production management, and military vehicle operations. Currently expanding into AI/software engineering while operating and maintaining robotic fleet systems, PLC safety devices, conveyors, and ABB robotic arms at Symbotic. Proven leadership background as a Restaurant General Manager and Shift Manager, with a foundation in disciplined operations from six years of Army National Guard service, including an overseas deployment to Iraq.

contact.note: Phone number and exact address intentionally excluded from public site.

roles.title: Automation System Operator
roles.description: Promoted into fleet/system operator role. Working closely with system engineers, trainers, and management to operate, maintain, and repair conveyors, PLC safety devices, Rovers, and ABB robotic arms under Lock Out Tag Out (LOTO) requirements.

roles.title: Robotics Operator
roles.description: Started as a Robotic Cell Operator depalletizing and building/stacking ready-to-ship pallets. Took on training responsibilities, time management duties, and cross-trained toward the System Operator/fleet manager role. Collaborated with engineers to optimize robot programming and workflows using sensor data.

roles.title: Warehouse Associate
roles.description: Operated assembly line with a team on framing, packaging, and equipment installation. Coordinated across multiple teams to maintain product traffic flow and navigated warehouse/yard operations to transport large, heavy products while keeping pace with assembly line output.

roles.title: Restaurant General Manager
roles.description: Directed daily operations for a store from opening day, scaling to 150-300 customers/day by year two. Responsible for hiring, staff training, inventory management, cash flow, and quality standards. Managed equipment issues, staff conflicts, and customer complaints while cross-training with other store managers.

roles.title: Manufacturing Machine Operator
roles.description: Operated and maintained 6-12 machines cutting precision drill bits. Interpreted job orders, adjusted machine settings, conducted product inspections, performed routine maintenance, and measured/weighed parts with precision.

roles.title: Machine Operator (CNC)
roles.description: Operated and maintained CNC machines, lathes, mills, and presses. Followed blueprints and work orders for production setup, monitored operations for issues, and maintained quality/production records.

experience.note: Concurrently held a second role at Rim Rock Bullets Inc. during this period.

roles.title: Casting Machine Operator (Concurrent)
roles.description: Second job held concurrently while at Jore/RMT. Operated and inspected molten lead casting equipment. Completed safety training for lead, tin, and wax materials handling.

roles.title: Heavy Equipment Operator / Warehouse Associate / Recycling Specialist
roles.description: Operated and maintained forklifts, excavators, front loaders, shearing machines, and cardboard/scrap metal balers. Built and loaded/unloaded pallet orders for shipment. Graded ferrous and non-ferrous materials.

military_service.description: Operated wheeled vehicles and equipment over varied terrain and roadways. Managed loading, unloading, and safety of personnel being transported. Identified, corrected, and reported vehicle deficiencies. Prepared vehicles for movement/shipment by air, rail, or vessel. Completed a deployment overseas to Iraq in support of Operation New Dawn.
